name: Iron Bastion
description: The Bastion Republic defends what it builds. Seven missions of fortification, counter-attack, and ultimate resilience.

missions.name: First Wall
missions.briefing: Kragmore raiders are testing Bastion defences along the eastern border.

missions.name: Fortress Protocol
missions.briefing: Build an impenetrable network of walls and turrets before the next Kragmore assault.
missions.twist: Kragmore will bring siege artillery — position walls to absorb the bombardment.

missions.name: The Aerial Siege
missions.briefing: Valkyr aircraft are bombing Bastion positions. Anti-air is critical.
missions.twist: Valkyr will attack in waves — prepare flak defences in multiple sectors.

missions.name: Counter-Strike
missions.briefing: Castellan Mira orders a rare offensive operation — capture the enemy supply hub.
missions.twist: Bastion units are slow — plan the strike route carefully to avoid being flanked.

missions.name: Naval Blockade
missions.briefing: Kragmore warships are blockading Bastion island colonies. Break through.
missions.twist: Stormrend will harry the supply ships from the flank — split forces carefully.

missions.name: The Coalition
missions.briefing: Three factions press in from all sides. The Bastion will hold.
missions.twist: Enemy factions will attempt to break through different sections of the wall simultaneously.

missions.name: The Six Fronts
missions.briefing: The Bastion Republic has maintained control of its sector. Now comes the final battle for the Cordite Nexus.
objectives: Fortify a defensive perimeter around the Nexus
Hold the Nexus for 15 minutes against all attackers
missions.twist: Bastion's strength is in defence — let the others weaken each other before making your move.
